strings.drefFormObjectiveOperationPlaceholder: This DREF allocation aims at supporting ….. of people in need affected by ……. Disaster, by providing …..(list sectors) support in the ……(list areas/regions) for …. months
strings.drefFormPeopleAssistedThroughOperation: Who will be targeted through this operation?
strings.drefFormPeopleAssistedThroughOperationDe: Explain the logic behind our targets. Which groups are we targeting and why are we targeting these particular groups? Explain how you will target vulnerable groups (e.g., Migrants, refugees, etc.)
strings.drefFormPeopleTargetedWithEarlyActions: Numbers of persons targeted with early actions (if any)
strings.drefFormPmer: How will this operation be monitored?
strings.drefFormPmerDescription: Will there be IFRC monitoring visits? How will it be deployed?
strings.drefFormResponseRationaleDescription: Please describe the strategy to conduct the assessment exercise, main objectives, who will be involved?
strings.drefFormResponseRationalePlaceholder: To address the needs of the targeted population, this DREF will aim at (please briefly describe the planned activities).
strings.drefFormRiskDoesNSHaveAntiFraudPolicy: Does your National Society have anti-fraud and corruption policy?
strings.drefFormRiskDoesNSHaveSexualAbusePolicy: Does your National Society have prevention of sexual exploitation and abuse policy?
strings.drefFormRiskDoesNSHaveChildProtectionPol: Does your National Society have child protection/child safeguarding policy?
strings.drefFormRiskDoesNSHaveWhistleblowerPolic: Does your National Society have whistleblower protection policy?
strings.drefFormRiskDoesNSHaveAntiSexualHarassme: Does your National Society have anti-sexual harassment policy?
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityPotentialRisk: Please analyse and indicate potential risks for this operation, its root causes and mitigation actions.
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityPotentialRiskAssessm: Please consider any possible challenges to conduct the assessment, any possible limitations in getting the information required and overall risk to the implementation
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityPotentialRiskDescrip: When identifying the risks, please review the IFRC Risk Management Policy and Framework including the different risk categories. When possible, make sure that your identification of risks includes some analysis of previous incidents and performance of the NS in previous operations.
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedDescript: Identify up to 5 key potential risks or threats that could negatively impact the success of the operation. These can range from environmental risks to social or logistical challenges.
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedPoint1: What are the primary risks that could affect the operation’s implementation?
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedPoint2: Are there any context-specific risks that need to be considered?
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedPoint3: How might these risks impact the operation’s objectives, timeline, or resources? Mitigation actions are actions or strategies that will be implemented to reduce or manage the identified risks, ensuring the operation can proceed as planned.
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedPoint4: What specific measures or strategies will be put in place to mitigate the risks identified?
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityRiskSelectedPoint5: Will contingency plans or additional resources be required to address these risks?
strings.drefFormRiskSecuritySafetyConcern: Please indicate any security and safety concerns for this operation
strings.drefFormRiskSecurityHasChildRiskComplete: Has the child safeguarding risk analysis assessment been completed?

The IFRC Child Safeguarding Risk Analysis helps Operations quickly identify and rate their key child safeguarding risks in order to reduce the risk of harm against children, as outlined as a requirement in the IFRC Child Safeguarding Policy. Here are the link to the tool and Q&A
strings.drefFormSelectionCriteria: Explain the selection criteria for the targeted population
strings.drefFormSelectionCriteriaDescription: Explain the rational and logic behind which groups are being targeted and why and address vulnerable groups
strings.drefFormSurgePersonnelDeployedDescriptio: Please provide the role profile needed.
strings.drefFormCommunication: Please briefly explain the National Societies communication strategy for this operation.
strings.drefFormCommunicationDescription: Will the IFRC be supporting with communication? What roles will be involved?
strings.drefFormEstimatedDisplacedPeople: Estimated Number of People on the move (if any)
strings.drefFormHumanResourceTitle: How many staff and volunteers will be involved in this operation.
strings.drefFormHumanResourceDescription: A brief description of the human resources that will be engaged in the operation, including both staff and volunteers.
strings.drefFormHumanResourceDescriptionPoint1: How many staff members and volunteers are expected to participate?
strings.drefFormHumanResourceDescriptionPoint2: What specific roles or responsibilities will they have during the operation?
strings.drefFormHumanResourceDescriptionPoint3: Are there any key leadership positions or coordinators overseeing the activities?
strings.drefFormIsVolunteerTeamDiverseTitle: Does your volunteer team reflect the gender, age, and cultural diversity of the people you’re helping? What gaps exist in your volunteer team’s gender, age, or cultural diversity, and how are you addressing them to ensure inclusive and appropriate support?
strings.drefFormIsVolunteerTeamDiverseDescriptio: This question is about making sure your team includes the right mix of people to best support those affected. For example, if you’re helping single female heads of households, it’s important to have enough female volunteers to make everyone feel comfortable and understood. Including team members who share the same language or cultural background as the people you’re helping can also make a big difference in building trust and providing effective support.
strings.drefFormLogisticCapacityOfNs: If there is procurement, will it be done by National Society or IFRC?
strings.drefFormLogisticCapacityOfNsDescription: Will it be for replenishment or for distribution? If for distribution, how long is the tendering expected to take? For Cash and Voucher Assistance, what is the status of the Financial Service Provider?
strings.drefOperationalUpdateFormTotalTargetedPo: Total targeted population is not equal to sum of other population fields
strings.drefOperationalUpdateFormTotalDrefAlloca: Total DREF allocation is not equal to sum of other budget fields
